review_text:
I’ve been wanting to get my 12-year-old tattoo removed for pretty much as long as I’ve had it. I talked to a few of the bigger laser places recently, but all I got were pushy salespeople, vague pricing, and no clear plan.

I ended up checking out this small studio in Montrose, and I’m really glad I did. The free consultation was super informative. John walked me through the tech, the process, what to expect after each session, and gave me a clear timeline for results.

I just had my first treatment and feel great about the decision. Excited to see how it all progresses over the next few months!
_place_title: Rethink Laser Tattoo Removal - Tattoo Removal in Houston, TX

review_text: I just moved from CO where I previously started my tattoo removal and was 3 sessions in. I was shopping around to get estimates from all other removal shops in Texas and reached out to Jason. I decided to go with my gut and was seen by Jason! This shop had the best prices, reasonable, and very thorough. Amazing customer service, I was communicated about the after care, estimate and the type of laser we were using immediately. Jasons transparency was the reason I trust this shop, he was honest and genuine and didn’t talk to me like a sales person did at other shops. _place_title: Rethink Laser Tattoo Removal - Tattoo Removal in Houston, TX

review_text:
I had my very first session with John at Rethink Tattoo Removal to start removing a 30-year-old tattoo that I’ve absolutely hated for decades. From the beginning, John was amazing. Even though I told him I had already done some research, he still took the time to walk me through the process, assess my tattoo, and clearly explain what to expect.

John is professional, knowledgeable, and extremely pleasant. I was told that I’d likely start to see results after a few sessions, but honestly, I could already see a noticeable difference after just one treatment!

I left feeling confident, comfortable, and excited to continue the process. If you are considering getting a tattoo removed, look no further. John is the person you want to see. 10/10- Highly Recommend.
